members.name: _Draw
members.signature: public void _Draw(RID toCanvasItem, Vector2 pos, Color modulate, bool transpose)
members.summary: Called when the entire [Texture2D] is requested to be drawn over a [CanvasItem], with the top-left offset specified in [param pos]. [param modulate] specifies a multiplier for the colors being drawn, while [param transpose] specifies whether drawing should be performed in column-major order instead of row-major order (resulting in 90-degree clockwise rotation). [b]Note:[/b] This is only used in 2D rendering, not 3D.

members.name: _DrawRect
members.signature: public void _DrawRect(RID toCanvasItem, Rect2 rect, bool tile, Color modulate, bool transpose)
members.summary: Called when the [Texture2D] is requested to be drawn onto [CanvasItem]'s specified [param rect]. [param modulate] specifies a multiplier for the colors being drawn, while [param transpose] specifies whether drawing should be performed in column-major order instead of row-major order (resulting in 90-degree clockwise rotation). [b]Note:[/b] This is only used in 2D rendering, not 3D.

members.name: _DrawRectRegion
members.signature: public void _DrawRectRegion(RID toCanvasItem, Rect2 rect, Rect2 srcRect, Color modulate, bool transpose, bool clipUv)
members.summary: Called when a part of the [Texture2D] specified by [param src_rect]'s coordinates is requested to be drawn onto [CanvasItem]'s specified [param rect]. [param modulate] specifies a multiplier for the colors being drawn, while [param transpose] specifies whether drawing should be performed in column-major order instead of row-major order (resulting in 90-degree clockwise rotation). [b]Note:[/b] This is only used in 2D rendering, not 3D.

members.name: _GetFormat
members.summary: Called when [method get_format] is called.

members.name: _GetHeight
members.summary: Called when the [Texture2D]'s height is queried.

members.name: _GetImage
members.summary: Called when [method get_image] is called.

members.name: _GetMipmapCount
members.summary: Called when [method get_mipmap_count] is called.

members.name: _GetWidth
members.summary: Called when the [Texture2D]'s width is queried.

members.name: _HasAlpha
members.summary: Called when the presence of an alpha channel in the [Texture2D] is queried.

members.name: _HasMipmaps
members.summary: Called when [method has_mipmaps] is called.

members.name: _IsPixelOpaque
members.summary: Called when a pixel's opaque state in the [Texture2D] is queried at the specified [code](x, y)[/code] position.

members.name: CreatePlaceholder
members.summary: Creates a placeholder version of this resource ([PlaceholderTexture2D]).

members.name: Draw
members.signature: public void Draw(RID canvasItem, Vector2 position, Color modulate, bool transpose)
members.summary: Draws the texture using a [CanvasItem] with the [RenderingServer] API at the specified [param position].

members.name: DrawRect
members.signature: public void DrawRect(RID canvasItem, Rect2 rect, bool tile, Color modulate, bool transpose)
members.summary: Draws the texture using a [CanvasItem] with the [RenderingServer] API.

members.name: DrawRectRegion
members.signature: public void DrawRectRegion(RID canvasItem, Rect2 rect, Rect2 srcRect, Color modulate, bool transpose, bool clipUv)
members.summary: Draws a part of the texture using a [CanvasItem] with the [RenderingServer] API.

members.name: GetFormat
members.summary: Returns the image format of the texture.

members.name: GetHeight
members.summary: Returns the texture height in pixels.

members.name: GetImage
members.summary: Returns an [Image] that is a copy of data from this [Texture2D] (a new [Image] is created each time). [Image]s can be accessed and manipulated directly. [b]Note:[/b] This will return [code]null[/code] if this [Texture2D] is invalid. [b]Note:[/b] This will fetch the texture data from the GPU, which might cause performance problems when overused. Avoid calling [method get_image] every frame, especially on large textures.

members.name: GetMipmapCount
members.summary: Returns the number of mipmaps of the texture.

members.name: GetSize
members.summary: Returns the texture size in pixels.

members.name: GetWidth
members.summary: Returns the texture width in pixels.

members.name: HasAlpha
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this [Texture2D] has an alpha channel.

members.name: HasMipmaps
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the texture has mipmaps.
